word: G3513 - νή - nḗ - nay - I protest by

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: I protest by
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: NA / Not Available
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Probably an intensive form of G3483; a particle of attestation (accompanied by the object invoked or appealed to in confirmation); as sure as: - I protest by.
